name: Yuuri
description: Yuuri is a care-free, fun-loving girl. She is the direct foil and companion of [Chito](https://anilist.co/character/120889). She carries an Arisaka type 38 rifle and loves food more than anything else in the world.

name: King
description: __Height:__ 165 cm King is a member of the Seven Deadly Sins and is the Sin of Sloth with the symbol of the Grizzly. He is also Oslo's master. King's real identity is Fairy King Harlequin, the king of the fairy race.

name: Kusuriuri
description: A mysterious wandering man with a vast knowledge of the supernatural and is mystical in appearance. He carries around a large wooden box filled with medicine and holy tools. Among them is an enchanted sword that is used to slay the mononoke. To use the sword, the Medicine Seller must find the "Katachi" (shape), "Makoto" (truth), and "Kotowari" (reasoning) of the mononoke he wishes to exorcise. name: Haru Yoshida
description: __Height:__ 178 cm (5'10") Haru is the male protagonist of the story. He is a high school student who sits next to Shizuku in class. He is a delinquent boy who is absent for a long time after getting in a fight early in the story. Despite being a trouble maker, he is a passionate boy who helps others and can achieve high grades with little effort. name: Nanami Aoyama
description: __Height:__ 158 cm Nanami is [Sorata](https://anilist.co/character/64169)'s classmate. Although she is harsh to Sorata, she actually has a crush on him, and everyone aside from Sorata has noticed this. She escaped from her home to become a voice actress and has to live on her own.

name: Senshi
description: __Height:__ 140 cm (4'7") Senshi is a member of Laios' party. He is a dwarf from the Eastern Continent. Having spent 10 years studying monster cuisine and living a self-sufficient life inside the dungeon, Senshi loves cooking and is more than happy to share his knowledge and skills. He is dependable and strong, but can also be rather stubborn and set in his ways. He helps maintain the natural environment and ecology of the dungeon, and considers himself part of it. name: Leone
description: __Height:__ 170cm (5'7) Leone is one of the older members of the assassination group, Night Raid. She has a very relaxed and a cheerful personality, which tends to display a lack of ladylike manners, such as shoving Tatsumi into her breasts, putting her feet on the table, or consuming large amounts of Sake. name: Kumoko
description: A high school girl of self-professed low standing who has reincarnated as a spider. In her former life, she lived as a shut-in and immersed herself in video games, but now she uses her remarkable mental strength to fight for survival. name: Lucy
description: Lucy is a Diclonius girl around eighteen years old. She has developed strong emotions of hatred and vengeance towards regular humans mainly because of how she was treated by the majority of them as a child, making fun of her horns and giving her insulting nicknames such as freak.

name: Eri
description: __Height:__ 110 cm __Quirk:__ Rewind Eri is a child with bandages all over her body. She wears a white short sleeve dress and has a small horn on the right side of her forehead and has white, long, choppy, unkempt hair. She also has red eyes. name: Kouichi Hirose
description: An ally and classmate who meets Josuke when Jotaro is searching for him, resulting in the two becoming quick friends. His stand is Echoes, which has three distinct forms, or Acts (Koichi can only call upon one at any given time).

name: Diablo
description: Diablo is the Black Primordial and a loyal servant of Rimuru Tempest. Before he met Rimuru, he went by the nicknames Black or Noir, the latter which he received from his fellow Primordial kin. After receiving the name Diablo from Rimuru, he evolved to a Demon Peer.

name: Kouko Kaga
description: She had a perfect future planned with Mitsuo Yanagisawa as her husband, and nothing will get in her way! She has a side of her that is not violent as Mitsuo has described.

name: Chihaya Ayase
description: __Height:__ 167cm (5'6") A determined schoolgirl who "possesses a remarkable hearing ability". She believes that by persevering in karuta, she will meet Arata again, and begins a karuta club at her high school with Mashima. While she is beautiful, she is considered too weird; her classmates refer to her as a "waste of a beauty". She has been described as a "tomboy trapped in a supermodel's body".

name: Meiko Honma
description: __Height:__ 147cm Menma is a ghost girl who suddenly appears several years after her death to Jinta and asks him to reunite their group of friends so her wish can be granted. Yet, she does not seem to remember what is her wish, but she knows she has to reunite her friends in order to remember. Despite being "dead", she is a very positive, energetic and lively person. According to Jinta, she is quite selfless and cries very often for others when they are hurt or upset, but not for herself. Jinta
